title: SAR FSM, Calibration & Top-Level ADC Integration
author: Hee Chan
summary: Completing the structural SAR ADC with a six-state FSM, a 5-bit comparator offset calibration loop, an SR latch on the comparator output, and a reorganised library hierarchy that ties the CDAC, comparator, and control logic into a single top-level sar block.

title: Building the Capacitive DAC for the SAR ADC
author: Hee Chan
summary: Implementing an 8-bit binary-weighted capacitive DAC with charge redistribution, along with ideal switch and inverter primitives, verified by a self-checking testbench — the structural core of the SAR ADC.

title: Comparator Behavioural Model for the SAR ADC
author: Jaime Pryor
summary: Building a Verilog-A comparator behavioural model with configurable supply rails and a Cadence Maestro testbench, verifying threshold detection with DC inputs as a first step towards full SAR ADC integration.

title: Sample-and-Hold Behavioural Model for the Analogue Front-End
author: Erick Gomez
summary: Developing a Verilog-AMS sample-and-hold behavioural model with a mixed-signal Cadence ADE Maestro testbench, bridging the amplifier/filter stage and the SAR ADC in our analogue signal chain.

title: Building the Amplifier & Filter Library in Cadence Virtuoso
author: Jaime Pryor
summary: Developing Verilog-A behavioural models for a variable-gain amplifier with integrated low-pass filtering and thermal noise, plus a reusable resistor primitive, all verified with Cadence Maestro testbenches.

title: SAR ADC Behavioural Model & Testbench in Verilog-AMS
author: Hee Chan
summary: Implementing an 8-bit successive approximation register ADC as a Verilog-AMS behavioural model with a Cadence ADE Maestro testbench, including noise analysis and SNR calculations for the analogue front-end.
